top_signals.title: Transcript: China wanted western tech. Now, the tables have turned. With John Minnich - Financial Times

top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: China unfazed by world’s ire on trade as premier touts openness
top_signals.summary: China's widening trade surplus with major partners has come under increased scrutiny as policymakers around the world weigh fresh measures to counter a flood of exports.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: FTSE 100 Segro shares rocket as it fights off £12.6bn swoop by US real estate giant
top_signals.summary: Real estate investment firm Segro has rejected a £12.6bn bid from a US fund looking to combine the two companies into one mammoth investment trust. Prologis said it had gone public with its offer in a bid to convince Segro shareholders to back the deal. As part of Prologis’ offer, Segro stocks would be valued [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
